text: 幾千の命　抱いて　戦った
それは夢の跡のような　禍で
恐れに膨らんだ　獣たちは　囁く
「迷えよ、いざ時は満ちた」
灯せ　胸の奥　生きる意味を砕かれても
生まれ落ちた炎はこの手にあるから
迷わずに　運命に抗え！
祝福を　ああ　気高き我が闘志に　光あれ
おごりなき瞳　何度でも　立ち上がれ
宿命よ　ああ　絆信じる者に　導きを
涙も愛も　終わらない　星々の瞬き
途切れた言葉は　大地に　還るだろう
誰もが夢見た世界　掴むまで
宙に瞬いた　憧れを焼き付けて
止まらず　歩み続けよう
照らせ　この瞬間を　消えない光を紡ぎだせ
刻んだ証が　いざなう未来へと
迷わずに　運命に立ち向かえ！
残酷に　ああ　解かれた魂を　解き放て
この声いつか　尽きるまで　燃やしたい
祝祭よ　ああ　歩き続ける者に　輝きを
穢れなき君の　終わりなき　星々の旅路へ
残酷に　ああ　解かれた魂を　解き放て
この声いつか　尽きるまで　燃やしたい
祝祭よ　ああ　歩き続ける者に　輝きを
穢れなき君の　終わりなき　星々の旅路へ
届けよう
戦いの歌 ～Against fate～
ナーフ

A battleground like a nightmare
The point where we all wish we could wake

Innocent lives ten thousand strong
With no hope, no light, no prayer

Ferocious beasts on the prowl
Feast on terror and fear as they howl
“Give up, give in, your time is nigh," comes their growl

Stand with me, fight your destiny!
Though the world that you love lies shattered in pieces

Light your spirit, keep up the fight
As I hold your flame in my hand

Till the bitter end
Never say goodnight, never give in

Your fate lies in your hands
May blessings and light shine down on you forever, my friend

And may the fire in your eyes never die
Stand up and fight on again

Oh Fate, we who believe in friendship and family
Lead us on through hardship and strife

Our love lives on through the years
Precious tears will shine like stars in the night
Eternally

A thousand words left unspoken
We hold them till they return to the earth

Wait for the time we dreamed of
Till it arrives, they lie unbroken

Though nights be dreadful and starless
Keep your feet moving onward regardless
Dreams are a flame to light your way in the darkness

Stand with me, fight your destiny!
Let the light in your soul burn on like a beacon

Shine your spirit into the night
Till it burns the darkness away

Walking to the day
Let it lead your way on to tomorrow

The pieces of your soul, so broken and bruised
Oh let go your hold. To freedom they fly!

Lift up your voice to the sky, burn it bright
Until the day that we die

O joy, temper our fears
We feast in the face of oncoming tears
Bring light to our lives

Guide on the purest of hearts
‘Neath these stars which shine so clear in the night
Down endless roads

The pieces of your soul, so broken and bruised
Oh let go your hold. To freedom they fly!

Lift up your voice to the sky, burn it bright
Until the day that we die

O joy, temper our fears
We feast in the face of oncoming tears
Bring light to our lives

Guide on the purest of hearts
‘Neath these stars which shine so clear in the night
Down endless roads
Into the day
Song of War: Against Fate
Nadereh
